mapper.select: select * from aiw_user_credential where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and credential_type = 'PASSWORD' and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_user_credential (biz_id, user_biz_id, credential_type, secret_hash, hash_algorithm, credential_version, changed_at, failed_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{userBizId}, #{credentialType}, #{secretHash}, #{hashAlgorithm}, #{credentialVersion}, #{changedAt}, #{failedAttempts}, #{lockedUntil}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update secret_hash = values(secret_hash), hash_algorithm = values(hash_algorithm), credential_version = values(credential_version), changed_at = values(changed_at), failed_attempts = values(failed_attempts), locked_until = values(locked_until), updated_at = values(updated_at), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
mapper.update: update aiw_user_credential set is_deleted = 1 where user_biz_id = #{userBizId}
